name: orchestrate-codex
description: Supervised multi-step recipes that bind Claude, Grok, Antigravity, and other Codex leaf providers.

interface.shortDescription: Recipe runner for multi-provider Codex leaves.
interface.longDescription: Defines durable/change/transform document classes and supervised recipes. Leaf providers (Claude, Grok, Antigravity) remain directly callable; this plugin only plans and verifies multi-step work.
defaultPrompt: Explain durable vs change context policy.
